posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump's "final deadline" for Iran is officially 12 hours away, with widespread reports that US-Iran peace talks have stalled.

The US has just struck Iran's Kharg Island which processes 90% of Iran's oil.

We expect the most eventful day of the Iran War yet.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
